name: amail-plugins
description: Apple Mail and Calendar CLI plugins for Claude Code on macOS Apple Silicon.

plugins.name: apple-mail
plugins.description: Read and manage Apple Mail.app — list accounts, browse mailboxes, list/read/search messages, send email, and manage filter rules.

plugins.name: ical
plugins.description: Read Apple Calendar events and calendars — list calendars, query events by date range, view today or upcoming events.
